name: Block Toolbar
description: Floating formatting toolbar that appears on text selection. Provides quick access to text formatting, links, and comments.

standard.description: Common formatting options with link and comment

extended.description: All formatting options including text color

minimal.description: Stripped-down toolbar with only bold, italic, and link formatting for simple text editing

visual_brief: Floating horizontal toolbar that appears above or near selected text. Rendered as a compact pill-shaped bar with a subtle shadow and surface background. Contains a row of small icon buttons: bold (B), italic (I), underline (U), strikethrough (S), code, link, highlight color picker, and comment. Buttons show active state with a filled background when the corresponding format is applied. The toolbar positions itself dynamically near the text selection with a small arrow pointing toward the selected content. Extended preset adds heading level, alignment, and list type buttons.

responsive.mobile: Toolbar renders full-width at the bottom of the screen as a fixed bar above the keyboard. Touch-friendly 44px button targets. Overflow actions collapse into a more menu.
responsive.tablet: Floating toolbar near selection. Slightly larger touch targets than desktop.
responsive.desktop: Floating toolbar tracks text selection precisely. Compact button sizing with hover tooltips for labels.
